Yin Kai ŚįĻś•∑
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Kai (ŚįĻś•∑). Mantained supplies for Yuan Shang. Killed by Xu Chu in the novel. Yin Kai was affiliated with Yuan Shang. Yin Kai lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
